message:
fix: address clippy lints and minor polish across broadcast, circuit_breaker, arena

- broadcast: use clone_from() instead of *waker = clone(); drop lock
  guard before returning Pending
- circuit_breaker: remove unused AtomicU32 import, suppress
  too_many_lines lint, simplify 0 | expr to expr
- arena: use exhaustive Slot::Vacant match arm instead of wildcard

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
